name: viewer
description: Time-series 3D point dataset viewer. Increment 1: render frame 0 of a synthetic dataset in a CSP-safe webview.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.test: node --test tests/contract.test.ts tests/geometry.test.ts tests/framing.test.ts tests/playback.test.ts tests/producer_protocol.test.ts tests/classification.test.ts tests/picking.test.ts
